business_question: Which providers have the highest average reimbursement per procedure?
business_context: Hospital administrators want to benchmark provider reimbursement performance.
sql_answer:
SELECT
    pr.provider_name,
    COUNT(c.procedure_id) AS procedure_count,
    SUM(c.approved_amount) AS total_reimbursement,
    ROUND(
        SUM(c.approved_amount) / COUNT(c.procedure_id), 2
    ) AS avg_reimbursement_per_procedure
FROM fact_claims c
JOIN dim_provider pr
    ON c.provider_id = pr.provider_id
GROUP BY pr.provider_name
ORDER BY avg_reimbursement_per_procedure DESC;
